name: bookclaw-mcp
description: Connects Claude Code to a running BookClaw MCP server over Streamable HTTP.

url.title: BookClaw MCP URL
url.description: Streamable HTTP endpoint of the running bookclaw-mcp server.

token.title: BookClaw MCP token
token.description: Bearer token that gates the MCP server (matches BOOKCLAW_MCP_TOKEN on the running server).
